Name: Takayamashichiten Hanbaikasugaten
Note: Kintetsu-Nara Stn + bus 10 min. Casual lunch stop near Kasuga Shrine; soba sets ¥1100.

Name: Jigokudani Yaen-Koen
Note: Yudanaka Stn + bus. Snow Monkeys — but May-Jun water is cool, fewer monkeys bathe; better as bookmark for next trip.

Name: Tōdai-ji
Note: Kintetsu-Nara Stn + bus 10 min. Great Buddha hall — squeeze through the 'Buddha's nostril' pillar for luck.

Name: Deer Park
Note: Kintetsu-Nara Stn (5 min). 1200 free-roaming deer — bow before they bow back; shika-senbei ¥200.
